software_development.label: Software Development
software_development.description: Skills for development workflows, CI/CD, code review, and project management

dev-workflow-claude.description: Universal dev lifecycle skill using Claude CLI. Handles the full pipeline from task intake to merged PR: plan, approval, branch, phased implementation, CI triage, review triage, coverage, and merge. Uses claude -p for all code generation. Human-in-the-loop via Telegram at every gate.

dev-workflow-opencode.description: Universal dev lifecycle skill using OpenCode with GLM/MiniMax. Handles the full pipeline from task intake to merged PR: plan, approval, branch, phased implementation, CI triage, review triage, coverage, and merge. Uses opencode run with pre-configured agents. Human-in-the-loop via Telegram at every gate.

opencode-configuration.description: Skill for configuring OpenCode with GLM and MiniMax providers. Teaches agents how to create and manage opencode.json, agent definitions, and provider configurations.
